'''Bongo Behemoths''' were [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] aquatic [[Cruiser (aquatic)|cruiser]], developed for shore bombardment and shelling of enemy fleets. Unlike most Gungan vehicles, they were not biological in form or appearance, and were instead streamlined, metallic ships. Whereas [[Tribubble bongo/Legends|tribubble bongos]] were squid-like in shape and movement, Behemoths were massive vessels, requiring two tentacle-like propellers on outriggers to propel them along the surface. Behemoths had limited submersible capability, as they were designed for bombardment, equipped with large [[Booma/Legends|booma]]-throwing [[Catapult/Legends|catapults]]. They were constructed at [[Shipyard (water)|shipyards]] and cost 200 units of [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]] and 150 units of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]]. They were first used around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[War of the Gungan tribes]] in [[3000 BBY]]. Later, during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], several cruisers unsuccessfully defended the Gungan [[City/Legends|city]] [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]] during the [[Siege of Otoh Gunga|Naboo Swamp Battle]].

==Behind the scenes==
Bongo Behemoths appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. They are the Gungan cruiser units, and are seen during the Gungan and Trade Federation campaigns.
